character_moves.name: Powder of Sympathy
character_moves.message: Digby applies the Powder of Sympathy! Wounds close as the molecules align.

character_moves.name: Glass of Antimony
character_moves.message: Digby shatters a flask of Antimony! The deck vanishes in red smoke.

ship_moves.name: Alchemical Chain-Shot
ship_moves.message: Corrosive chains targeted at the masts.

intrigue_moves.name: High Rhetoric
intrigue_moves.message: Digby quotes Aristotle with a Levantine flourish. Suspicion ebbs.

intrigue_moves.name: Alchemical Gift
intrigue_moves.message: A vial of Philosophic Mercury changes hands. The official is convinced.

intrigue_moves.name: Demonstrated Proof
intrigue_moves.message: Sir Kenelm displays his laboratory findings. Doubt is extinguished.

enemy_moves.name: Matchlock Volley
enemy_moves.message: The Venetian fires a flintlock! Smoke fills the deck.

enemy_moves.name: Boarding Axe
enemy_moves.message: A heavy iron axe bites into the woodwork and bone.
